summary: Structured ClinicalTrials.gov outcomes were extracted for the primary CTx endpoint, P1NP timepoints, BMD, SASP, and aggregate adverse events. Human review is still needed before promotion because publication full-text tables and subgroup details were not fully extracted.

findings.claim_or_issue: Posted registry group values, sample sizes, p-values, and safety aggregate counts were extracted into result records.
findings.why_it_matters: This is the first result-bearing slice that is more than a triage placeholder.
findings.recommended_action: Use these records as the template for future registry result extraction.

findings.claim_or_issue: The extraction does not yet include full publication tables, supplementary data, or all exploratory subgroup values.
findings.why_it_matters: ClinicalTrials.gov posted results and PubMed abstract are not a full substitute for publication-level endpoint extraction.
findings.recommended_action: Before promotion, extract full article tables/supplements where accessible and reconcile registry dispersion with publication-reported IQRs.
